reason: Successfully executed GitHub account access flow and verified agent returned GitHub username in response
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing multiple agents including "QA-20260327-000411-kzjm" with "idle" status
Clicked on "QA-20260327-000411-kzjm" agent in sidebar - Navigated to agent's landing page showing the agent name and "idle" status
Verified agent status is "idle" - Confirmed agent status shows "idle" which is a valid running state
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." into the message input field - Message was entered successfully and send button became enabled
Clicked send button - Message was submitted and agent status changed to "working"
Waited for account access card to appear - After ~8 seconds, a card titled "Access Requested: GitHub" appeared asking to grant account access
Selected GitHub account checkbox - GitHub account checkbox was checked, showing "1" selected account
Clicked "Grant Access" button - Access was granted and agent resumed processing with the GitHub account
Waited for agent response - Agent completed in 44 seconds after fetching GitHub profile via proxy
Verified response includes GitHub username - Response clearly states "Your GitHub username is yiw190" and includes additional account details (Pro plan, 3 public repos, 13 private repos, 2FA enabled)
Took screenshot of final response - Full page screenshot captured showing the complete conversation flow and final response with GitHub username
